hero.subheadline: Manage your production with a visual board your whole team understands in minutes. No paper, no erased whiteboards, no chaos.
hero.social_proof: Over 500 workshops already working this way

problem.label: Sound familiar?
problem.title: The daily reality of many workshops

items.title: The whiteboard gets erased
items.desc: The night shift operator doesn't know where each piece stands. All the day's context, gone.

items.title: Papers disappear
items.desc: Paper orders end up under tools or simply vanish. A chaos that costs real money.

items.title: No history, no control
items.desc: How long did the last batch take? Which phase caused the delay? Without data, there's no improvement—just guesswork.

features.label: What's included
features.title:
Everything your workshop needs.
Nothing more.

items.title: Visual board
items.desc: See the status of every piece at a glance. Drag and drop to update progress. No training needed.

items.title: Easy for your team
items.desc: If they can use a phone, they can use Production Tracker. Real onboarding in under 5 minutes.

items.title: Automatic history
items.desc: Every move is saved. Look up the history of any order, any time, from any device.

gallery.label: The app in action
gallery.title: Total clarity at every stage.
gallery.desc: From raw material intake to final delivery. Every piece has its place, every operator knows their task.

progress.label: Visual tracking
progress.title:
Your production status,
at a glance.
progress.desc: Each phase has its status. Green = done, in progress = animated, pending = waiting.

testimonials.text: We used to lose orders all the time. Now the whole team knows what to do without me explaining everything every morning.
testimonials.name: Carlos M.

testimonials.text: What I liked most is that my operators learned it by themselves. No training, no manuals. By afternoon, everyone was using it.
testimonials.name: Ana R.

cta.title: Ready to retire your whiteboard?
cta.desc: Start your free trial. No credit card, no commitment.
